headline.purpose: Page and route titles — the largest text in the app; there are no heroes.

title.purpose: Section headers, card titles, drawer headings, the primary identifier in a list row.

body.purpose: Workhorse size: form fields, descriptions, table cells, prose (cap measure at 65–75ch).

label.purpose: Field labels, chip text, secondary metadata, status text — sentence case.

mono.purpose: Emission-factor codes, IDs, scope tags, any fixed-width identifier.

shadows.name: float
shadows.purpose: Genuinely floating layers only — popovers, dropdowns, dialogs, sheets, command palette. Resting cards/rows never get this.

shadows.name: sticky-bar
shadows.purpose: Pinned bottom action bars separate via border-top + bg-background/95 + backdrop-blur, not shadow.

motion.name: transition-colors
motion.purpose: Default for hover/active color shifts on buttons, rows, chips.

motion.name: press
motion.purpose: Real pressed state on buttons — distinct from hover, mimics NSButton.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.value: all durations pinned to 0.01ms under prefers-reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Honors the OS reduce-motion preference while keeping transitionEnd handlers firing.

breakpoints.name: container-content
breakpoints.value: @container/content (renderer scroll root drives layout, not viewport media queries)

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single most important action on a page — filled carbonink green. One per page.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; white-space: nowrap; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.99 0.005 95); background: oklch(0.55 0.16 160); transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.55 0.16 160 / 0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: oklch(0.55 0.16 160 / 0.95); transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: The default for every secondary action — 1px border, near-white fill, ring-less focus.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; white-space: nowrap; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0 1rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.929 0 0); border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.18 0.012 95); background: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.4); transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 150ms; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.8); } .ds-btn-outline:active { background: oklch(1 0 0); transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.55 0.16 160); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary and in-row actions — no border; focus paints a faint ink wash.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; white-space: nowrap; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.18 0.012 95); background: transparent; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.18 0.012 95 / 0.05); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { background: oklch(0.18 0.012 95 / 0.08); transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; background: oklch(0.18 0.012 95 / 0.08); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: White field, 1px Rule Line border, border-color focus shift with no outer halo so it never clips inside overflow:auto panes.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="排放源名称 / Source name" />
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.008 95); border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.18 0.012 95); background: oklch(1 0 0); cursor: text; transition: border-color 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.5 0.012 95); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.55 0.16 160); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Scope Badge
components.description: The most common chip — a scope tag. Uppercase label pairs with color so meaning never rides on color alone.
components.html: SCOPE 1
components.css: .ds-badge-scope { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.25rem; width: fit-content; white-space: nowrap; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid transparent; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: oklch(0.99 0.005 95); background: oklch(0.55 0.16 160); } .ds-badge-scope svg { width: 12px; height: 12px; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: List Row
components.description: The signature data primitive — preferred over tables. Title row (truncating identifier + status) over a meta row of chips and dot-separated metadata, ruled by dividers.
components.html:
• 柴油发电机 · Diesel generator已定稿
    SCOPE 1固定燃烧1,284.50 tCO₂e
components.css: .ds-list { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; border: 1px solid oklch(0.929 0 0); border-radius: 0.5rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); overflow: hidden; } .ds-list-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.929 0 0); transition: background 150ms; } .ds-list-row:first-child { border-top: none; } .ds-list-row:hover { background: oklch(0.95 0.008 95 / 0.3); } .ds-list-main { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-list-titlerow { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-list-title { font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.18 0.012 95); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-list-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.5 0.012 95); } .ds-list-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; margin-top: 0.25rem; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.5 0.012 95); } .ds-list-meta > span + span::before { content: '·'; margin-right: 0.5rem; color: oklch(0.5 0.012 95); } .ds-list-scope { padding: 0.0625rem 0.375rem; border-radius: 0.25rem; background: oklch(0.95 0.008 95); font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: oklch(0.3 0.012 95); } .ds-list-scope::before { content: none !important; } .ds-list-num { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Row
components.description: App-shell navigation row — cursor:default (chrome, not a web link), active state on the green-tinted accent.
components.html: 排放清单问卷披露
components.css: .ds-sidebar { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.125rem; width: 13rem; padding: 0.5rem; background: oklch(0.985 0 0); border-right: 1px solid oklch(0.929 0 0); } .ds-nav-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.625rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.18 0.012 95); cursor: default; user-select: none; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-nav-row:hover { background: oklch(0.18 0.012 95 / 0.06); } .ds-nav-active { background: oklch(0.94 0.012 160); color: oklch(0.30 0.13 160); }

narrative.overview: CarbonInk is an accountant's ledger made digital. Pure-white pages, ink-dark figures, and a single green mark of verification. The interface never competes with the data on it; it is the calm, ruled surface the numbers sit on. Density is a feature, earned by being relentlessly quiet — hierarchy comes from type scale, weight, and whitespace, never from color floods or chrome. Borders and near-imperceptible tonal steps separate surfaces; the forest-green brand is the one accent, spent sparingly so its appearance always means something. The craft bar is a first-class native macOS/Windows app, measured against the calm, legible data display of the Stripe Dashboard. It rejects the flashy SaaS marketing-dashboard, consumer-app cuteness, web-app tells, and the undifferentiated enterprise spreadsheet.
keyCharacteristics: Pure-white surfaces, separated by 1px borders and ≤2% tonal steps, not shadow.
One brand color (carbonink green), spent on ≤10% of any screen.
Type-and-space hierarchy; the screen is calm even when it is full.
Native chrome down to cursors, font stacks, and window-drag regions.
Bilingual zh-CN / en parity is structural — layouts hold in both, always.
Numbers are tabular-nums; codes and identifiers are monospace.

rules.name: The One Mark Rule
rules.body: Carbonink green covers ≤10% of any screen and never two co-equal greens at once. Reserve the filled-green button for the single most important action per page; everything else is outline or ghost. When green appears, it means verified, primary, or active — never decoration.

rules.name: The No-Fill-For-Cards Rule
rules.body: Cards and the page share one white. Separation is a 1px Rule Line plus, at most, a ≤2% tonal step. If you reach for a gray card fill to create depth, you have broken the ledger.

rules.name: The Sentence-Case Rule
rules.body: Labels and section eyebrows are sentence case. No all-caps tracked eyebrows above sections — uppercase is reserved for short scope tags (SCOPE 1) and nowhere else. whitespace-nowrap on every button label so 2-character CJK labels never wrap to a vertical stack.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: If it is not actually floating above the page, it has no shadow. Depth at rest is border + tone. If you find yourself adding a box-shadow to a card to make it pop, you have left the system — pull it back to a Rule Line.

dos: Do reserve the filled green button for the single most important action on a page; everything else is outline or ghost (the One Mark Rule, ≤10% green).
Do convey depth with a 1px border (oklch(0.929 0 0)) and ≤2% tonal steps; give shadow only to genuinely floating layers (popovers, dialogs, command palette).
Do keep cards and the page on the same pure white (oklch(1 0 0)).
Do use cursor: default on all chrome; restore the I-beam only on inputs and the pointer only on inline content links.
Do test every layout in both zh-CN and en; add whitespace-nowrap to button labels so CJK never stacks vertically. Keys land in both messages/*.json.
Do use tabular-nums for figures and font-mono for codes/IDs.
Do pair status/scope color with an icon or label so meaning never rides on color alone; honor prefers-reduced-motion.
Do hold muted body text at oklch(0.5 0.012 95) or darker on white — verify ≥4.5:1 (≥3:1 for large text), placeholders included.
donts: Don't build the flashy SaaS marketing-dashboard: no hero-metric template, no decorative gradients, no glassmorphism. That energy lives in cloud/web, never in the app shell.
Don't introduce consumer-app cuteness — no mascots, bouncy/elastic motion, or emoji-as-UI.
Don't ship web-app tells: cursor: pointer on chrome, painted CSS window corners, or fonts that fight the OS stack.
Don't add a box-shadow to a resting card to make it pop — use a Rule Line.
Don't give a card a gray fill to fake elevation (the No-Fill-For-Cards Rule).
Don't add a 2–3px focus ring/halo — shift the border to ring instead.
Don't use all-caps tracked eyebrows above sections; uppercase is for short scope tags only.
Don't reach for a table on an interactive data page — use the list-row; tables truncate the moment one descriptor grows.
Don't use border-left/border-right > 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards, rows, or callouts.
